posts.author: FerSalasMB (Fernanda Salas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’ve been seting up a workflow on an editorial process for my company but I have trouble with several automations related to assigning people, time tracking and due dates. None of them seem to be working so I reached to Monday support for help.
They told me my automations seem to be correct and should work but never trigger anything even though I checked that they aren’t clashing with another automations.
How can I know why they are not working and how to fix it?

Thank you!

posts.author: FerSalasMB (Fernanda Salas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @michaelmcday !

I’m certain he would provide valuable help to our process since we have many automations and details on hold because we cannot find what’s not working.

Thank you very much for sharing your contact!
